# mongodb_query_shape (Data Source)

Retrieve the query shape hash from MongoDB.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `collection` (String) Name of the collection.
- `command` (String) Type of command. One of: find, aggregate, distinct, count.
- `database` (String) Name of the database.

### Optional

- `allow_disk_use` (Boolean) Allow disk use for aggregation operations.
- `batch_size` (Number) Number of documents to return per batch.
- `collation` (String) JSON string representing the collation specification.
- `filter` (String) JSON string representing the query filter.
- `hint` (String) JSON string representing the index hint.
- `key` (String) The field to use for distinct command.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of documents to return.
- `pipeline` (String) JSON string representing the aggregation pipeline array.
- `projection` (String) JSON string representing the projection specification.
- `skip` (Number) Number of documents to skip.
- `sort` (String) JSON string representing the sort specification.

### Read-Only

- `hash` (String) The SHA256 hash of the query shape.
